feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Time evaluation ZL issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I run the Time Evaluation for the month  the ZL wage type is not generating . when I run the Time Evaluation for pay period the ZL Wage type is generating with hours from the custom PCR wrongly. The wage type should not generate when I run the month and the pay period. May be the buffer of the ZL is not clearing from the PCR. Any one has idea on this. could you please help me to solve this.

 

Thanks

Revathi.

 

Warm Regards,

Revathi.

entry.title: Necessity HCM integration activation on SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

We are now planning to conversion from SAP ECC6.0 to S/4HANA2023 for HCM.

On SAP Note2340095, I found the following description;"With the conversion to SAP S/4HANA the implementation of the employee business partner is mandatory".
Reference:https://me.sap.com/notes/2340095/E

We use PERNR data on SAP HCM ECC6.0 now, but don't and won't need to use the BP master for payment, because we make payment data using only SAP Standard Program(RPCSC000 etc) on HCM without FI-AP.

Could anyone give me an idea whether we should activate the HCM integration and make BP master record per employee in this case or not?

If neccesary info to answer is lacked, ask it to me.

Best regards.

entry.title: Lift and shift for HR Mini master
entry.content:
Hi All,

do we any documentation on Lift and shift for HR Mini master from ECC to S/4 hana ?

Thanks,

Venu

entry.title: Posting infotype 14 WAGE TYPE TO different WBS
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a specific wage type (BONUS) amount in infotype 14 , which should be posted to WBS Element during payroll posting. 

i have checked infotype 27, but it allows to split only on payroll or travel.

How can i post only BONUS from infotype 14 to a specific WBS element in FINANCE. please advice.

entry.title: Leave Quota through PT60
entry.content:
We are generating Leave Quota through PT60 where PL is generated in January every year whereas for new joiners PL is generated after 1 year from Joining Date on pro-rata basis. Unutilized Leaves will lapse on every 31st December.

In addition to this, for new joiners, we want: -

  • PL Quota to be generated on completing 6 months.
  • This Quota will not lapse on 31st December of the year in which employee has completed 6 months.

How to configure this?

entry.title: Leave Quota through PT60
entry.content:
We are generating Leave Quota through PT60 where PL is generated in January every year whereas for new joiners PL is generated after 1 year from Joining Date on pro-rata basis. Unutilized Leaves will lapse on every 31st December.

In addition to this, for new joiners, we want: -

  • PL Quota to be generated on completing 6 months.
  • This Quota will not lapse on 31st December of the year in which employee has completed 6 months.

How to configure this?

entry.title: Outbound IDOC Missing: Segment E1P1000 is missing in E1PLOGI for Basic type HRMD_A07?
entry.content:
Hello Dears,
Greetings!

I am working on outbound IDOC.

Basic type: HRMD_A07

Message type: HRMD_A

I am using the Tcode: PFAL to send the HR Master data from SAP using Outbound IDOC to the target system and it generates all segments without missing.

However, when we run the RBDMIDOC program it generates the Idoc segment E1P1001 only, the other segment is not generated for example employee master data (E1P0000, E1P0001, E1P0002, etc...), and E1P1000.

I have checked the IDOC, and the whole segment E1P1000 is missing/does not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI.

Why the segment E1P1000 and other segments missing/do not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Ibro Nur

entry.title: Variable Pay Executive Review
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have noticed that when we export the executive review, there is not a way to distinguish if the extracted amount is in Functional currency, or not.

We noticed that the export follows the settings, that is, if we select Functional currency, the excel is in functional currency, and if we select Employee Local Currency, the excel is in local currency.

Is there a way to be able to make the distinction when exporting?

Thanks and regards,

Alekxia

entry.title: Job Requisition
entry.content:
How to streamline the incorporation of job requisition route maps within business protocols, such as dynamically activating distinct approval pathways based on whether the requisition is for a new position or a replacement? and also like if within Budget or over the Budget etc. 

Can anyone please help on it. Thank you.

entry.title: No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230 Technical error no. 72
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While Running time evaluation, i got this error

No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230
echnical error no. 72
1.09.2023 Processing terminated for EE 

It appeared after i made a new entry on  V_T510S.  I tried to make a new wage type selection rule since the wage type for overtime worked isnt showing on the payroll run, even thought the overtime quota number is recorded on the TIP table. 

Please help me solve this issue

Thanks, 

Kelvin

entry.title: Wrong generation of final date of absenteeism quota from time evaluation (2006)
entry.content: When evaluating personnel times, the system is generating the wrong final deduction date, it is not entering 31129999. Has anyone had this problem?

entry.title: Pay slip Display Issue in Human Capital Management
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

Client facing Gosi deduction is not appear in Pay slip.

In Monthly Gosi deduction for Saudi employees are not showing in pay slip. when client take printout in pay slips.
While simulation it is appearing and calculation is ok. Only while generating (PC00_M24_HRF - Payroll -> Payroll -> Remuneration Statement with HR Forms) it is not appearing. This is the first month, Client are printing after SAP upgrades have been done..

 

Thanks,

Mohan

 

HCM (Human Capital Management) HCM Time Management #sap HCM calculation SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Human Resources #HCM Payroll Saudi

entry.title: Disable Promotion functionality
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We want to disable the standard #Promotion functionality for Compensation

The option is not flagged in the Display Setting

Also, the Enable Compensation-EC promotion Integration is not flagged

However, when we access both in the forms and in Executive Review, Promotion functionality is visible.

Do you know how to deactivate the visibility?

Thanks,

Alekxia

entry.title: Attendance Quota Not getting processed on TO20
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

I tried to configure a new attendance quotas from a different personnel subarea and employee group. I already grouped the PSG and ESG for time quota and time recording, however this employee overtime isn't getting processed on PCR TO20 like the other employee (They both got evaluated by the same schema). Below is the Comparison of both employee's time evaluation. 

Image 1 Overtime didn't get processed

 Image 2 Overtime Processed

 I already got V_T510S WSR configured. Is there anything i missed?, any input would be appreciated.

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Different overtime rate on public holiday for certain holiday religion and employee's religion
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

How do i set up configuration for this scenario

- If public holiday is for muslim, then muslim employee will get overtime rate of 4x, while employee with other religions will only get 2x overtime rate and vice versa (The overtime rate depend on the public holiday's and employee's religious denomination)

Any advise is appreciated

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Daily work schedule use both automatic overtime and approved overtime
entry.content:
Hi Experts. 

We have requirement for the overtime to be automatically calculated without approval 2 hours after the end of working hours and after that the employee will still be able to request for more overtime if he want to. The case would be like this

- An employee have planned working hours of 07:00-17:00, from 15:00-17:00 will be considered as automatic overtime because they must take it. After 17:00 they will have the option to do more overtime by using IT2007.

As far as i have checked, once we use the automatic overtime we won't be able to use IT2007.

Any input and advise would be appreciated

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: SAP HCM leave quotas
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am new in HCM and I have to configure leave quotas. Here is the scenario,

After competing the probation period employees will get leaves. sick 16,casual 10,annaul 14 how will I configure this please help me with the configuration steps.

Thanks.

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: Worker availabilty data cds view and block time sheet entries for non working days
entry.content:
Hi, do you know in which CDS the availability data is stored, e.g. if I create via the API an entry for an Worker for public holiday? I can successfully create an entry and I do see it in the manage my time sheet app a a grey block for the specific day. And would it be possible to block time sheet entries for non working days?

thanks in advance

Gabriel

entry.title: SAP HCM Mini Master Usage without Combability Pack
entry.content:
We plan to use Mini master infotypes mentioned in the SAP Note 3369920 - SAP S/4HANA without HCM - use of HR mini-master (subset of HCM infotypes) - SAP for Me . In addition to these mini master infotypes, can we use PD Infotypes(Organization Management Infotypes) like Infotypes 1000, 1001(Tables HRP1000, HRP1001) without any HCM license requirement? 

 # SAP HCM Mini Master SAP Fiori for SAP ERP HCM SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core SAP S/4HANA 

@SAPHCM
